posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I’m excited to share that you can now integrate Mailchimp into monday using the Data Importer monday app for free.

A few things you can do with Mailchimp using Data Importer

  • Bulk import your entire contact list from an audience.
  • Import various contact fields (e.g. name, email, status & custom merge fields) and stats (e.g. average open rate)
  • Schedule imports to keep your monday board in sync when new contacts are added to Mailchimp.

I’ve also created a step-by-step tutorial for more details on how to import Mailchimp contacts

Screenshot 2025-03-16 at 19.47.541992×1084 141 KB
